A

abort(AbortMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.ProtocolController
Phase 2 ABORT: applies the abort decision to the local log.
ABORT_SENT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
aborted() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Returns the value of the aborted record component.
ABORTED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.TransactionStatus
At least one NO vote or timeout; ABORT broadcast in progress or complete.
AbortMessage - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Message sent by the coordinator to participants during Phase 2 to abort a transaction.
AbortMessage(UUID) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.AbortMessage
Creates an instance of a AbortMessage record class.

Activates this fault with the provided parameters.

Registers the crash interceptor on all API paths.

applyDecision(TransactionStatus) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
Applies the final COMMIT or ABORT decision and stamps the decision time.
applyFault(FaultRequest) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.api.CoordinatorFaultController
Injects or clears a fault on the coordinator.
applyFault(FaultRequest) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application.CoordinatorFaultService
Applies the fault described in the request to the coordinator.
applyFault(FaultRequest) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.application.FaultInjectionService
Applies or clears the fault described in the request.
avgDecisionMs() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Returns the value of the avgDecisionMs record component.

BAD_REQUEST - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.api.ResponseBodyKey
Standard label for HTTP 400 Bad Request responses.

Abstract base controller for the simulation-mode configuration endpoint.

commit(CommitMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.ProtocolController
Phase 2 COMMIT: applies the commit decision to the local log.
COMMIT_SENT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
CommitMessage - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Message sent by the coordinator to participants during Phase 2 to commit a transaction.
CommitMessage(UUID) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.CommitMessage
Creates an instance of a CommitMessage record class.
committed() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Returns the value of the committed record component.
COMMITTED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.TransactionStatus
All votes received as YES; COMMIT broadcast in progress or complete.
compute() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.application.MetricsService
Computes and returns the current aggregate metrics.
configureMessageBroker(MessageBrokerRegistry) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.WebSocketConfig
 
consumeNoVote() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy
Consumes one forced NO vote.
consumeSend() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.PartialSendFaultStrategy
Consumes one send slot and returns whether this send should proceed.
COORDINATOR - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.NodeRole
Identifies the coordinator node in event payloads.
COORDINATOR_CRASHED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
COORDINATOR_RECOVERED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
CoordinatorApplication - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator
Entry point for the 2PC Coordinator service.
CoordinatorApplication() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.CoordinatorApplication
 
CoordinatorConfig - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config
Spring configuration that wires CoordinatorFaultStrategy implementations into a Map<FaultType, CoordinatorFaultStrategy> bean consumed by the fault-injection service, and registers the crash interceptor.
CoordinatorConfig() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.CoordinatorConfig
 
CoordinatorFaultController - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.api
REST controller for injecting and clearing faults on the coordinator node.
CoordinatorFaultController() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.api.CoordinatorFaultController
 
CoordinatorFaultService - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application
Manages fault injection state for the coordinator node.
CoordinatorFaultService() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application.CoordinatorFaultService
 
coordinatorFaultStrategies(CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy, PartialSendFaultStrategy, DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.CoordinatorConfig
Exposes all coordinator fault strategies keyed by FaultType.
CoordinatorFaultStrategy - Interface in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain
Strategy contract for applying or clearing a specific type of fault on the coordinator.
CoordinatorHeartbeatMonitor - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure
Actively monitors coordinator liveness by polling its GET /api/coordinator/status endpoint at a configurable interval.
CoordinatorHeartbeatMonitor(WebClient.Builder, String, UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.CoordinatorHeartbeatMonitor
 
CoordinatorNodeStatus - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain
Immutable snapshot of the coordinator's health status at a given point in time.
CoordinatorNodeStatus(String, NodeStatus, List<String>) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorNodeStatus
Creates an instance of a CoordinatorNodeStatus record class.
coordinatorOpenApi() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.OpenApiConfig
Configures the OpenAPI metadata displayed in Swagger UI.
CoordinatorStatusController - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.api
REST controller that reports the current status of the coordinator node.
CoordinatorStatusController() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.api.CoordinatorStatusController
 
CoordinatorStatusService - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application
Computes the current health status of the coordinator node.
CoordinatorStatusService() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application.CoordinatorStatusService
 
CoordinatorTransaction - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain
Mutable coordinator-side view of a 2PC transaction.
CoordinatorTransaction(String) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
Creates a transaction in TransactionStatus.INITIATED state.
CRASH - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultType
Node returns HTTP 503 to all requests, simulating a full crash.
crashCoordinatorFaultStrategy() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.CoordinatorConfig
Singleton bean for the crash-fault strategy so the interceptor and the strategy map share the same instance.
CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure
CoordinatorFaultStrategy that simulates a coordinator crash by setting an atomic flag.
CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy
 
CrashCoordinatorInterceptor - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure
Spring MVC interceptor that returns HTTP 503 on every request when the coordinator crash simulation is active.
CrashCoordinatorInterceptor(CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashCoordinatorInterceptor
 
CRASHED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.NodeStatus
Node is simulating a crash; returns 503 to all requests.
CrashFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
CRASH fault strategy: when active, the node returns HTTP 503 to all incoming requests.
CrashFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashFaultStrategy
 
CrashInterceptor - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
Servlet interceptor that returns HTTP 503 for every request when the CRASH fault is active.
CrashInterceptor() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashInterceptor
 

D

deactivate() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, returning the coordinator to normal operation.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, returning the coordinator to normal operation.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, returning the coordinator to normal operation.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.PartialSendFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, returning the coordinator to normal operation.
deactivate() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.domain.ParticipantFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, restoring normal node behaviour.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, restoring normal node behaviour.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, restoring normal node behaviour.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.IntermittentFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, restoring normal node behaviour.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.NetworkDelayFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, restoring normal node behaviour.
deactivate() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.TransientFaultStrategy
Deactivates this fault, restoring normal node behaviour.
decidedAt() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionResponse
Returns the value of the decidedAt record component.
DECISION_MADE - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
DEGRADED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.NodeStatus
Node is degraded (e.g., network delay or message loss active but not crashed).
DELAYED_DECISION_MS - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
Default delay before the Phase-2 broadcast in the DELAYED_DECISION strategy (3 000 ms).
delayedDecisionFaultStrategy() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.CoordinatorConfig
Singleton bean for the delayed-decision fault strategy.
DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure
CoordinatorFaultStrategy that inserts an artificial delay before the coordinator broadcasts its Phase 2 decision, simulating a slow or stalled coordinator.
DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy
 

E

elect(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.application.ElectionService
Runs the termination protocol for transactionId.
ELECTION_RESULT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
ELECTION_STARTED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
ElectionController - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.api
REST endpoints used during coordinator-failure election.
ElectionController(InMemoryTransactionLog, ElectionService, String) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.api.ElectionController
 
ElectionService - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.application
Implements the participant-side termination protocol that runs when the coordinator does not respond.
ElectionService(InMemoryTransactionLog, PeerConsultationClient, SimulationModeService, List<String>) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.application.ElectionService

JSON key for the short error-category label, e.g.

Publishes SystemEventDto events to all connected WebSocket subscribers.

EVENTS - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.event.domain.WebSocketTopic
Topic for all protocol and status events consumed by the React UI.
eventType() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SystemEventDto
Returns the value of the eventType record component.
EventType - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.enums
Significant events that flow through the system and are broadcast via WebSocket to the UI.

F

FAULT_CLEARED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
FAULT_INJECTED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
FaultController - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.api
REST controller for injecting and clearing faults on this participant node.

Default parameter values for all fault-injection strategies.

Manages fault injection state for a single participant node.

Request body for injecting a fault into a node.

Convenience constructor for faults with no parameters (e.g.

Builds the fault strategy map keyed by FaultType.
FaultType - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.enums
Types of faults that can be injected into any node (coordinator or participant).
fetchLogEntry(String, UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.PeerConsultationClient
Fetches the persisted log entry for transactionId from the peer at peerBaseUrl.
findAll() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.ParticipantRepository
Returns all currently registered participants.
findAll() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure.InMemoryParticipantRepository
 
findAll() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.application.TwoPhaseCommitService
Returns all transactions recorded by the coordinator.
findAll() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.TransactionRepository
Returns all transactions in insertion order.
findAll() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionRepository
 
findAllWithPhase(TransactionStatus) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
Returns all log entries whose phase matches the given status.
findById(String) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.ParticipantRepository
Look up a participant by its stable server identifier.
findById(String) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure.InMemoryParticipantRepository
 
findById(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.application.TwoPhaseCommitService
Retrieves a transaction by its unique identifier.
findById(UUID) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.TransactionRepository
Retrieves a transaction by its unique identifier.
findById(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionRepository
 
FORCE_ABORT_VOTE - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultType
Forces the participant to vote NO on the next N prepare requests, regardless of its actual state.
ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
FORCE_ABORT_VOTE fault strategy: forces the participant to vote NO on the next N prepare requests.
ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy
 

G

getById(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.api.TransactionController
Returns details of a single transaction.
getConfig() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.simulation.BaseSimulationConfigController
Returns the current simulation configuration.
getDecidedAt() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
 
getDelayMs() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy
Returns the configured delay in milliseconds.
getDelayMs() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.NetworkDelayFaultStrategy
Returns the configured delay in milliseconds.
getId() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
 
getInitiatedAt() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
 
getIntValue() - Method in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
Returns the default value as an int, for use with APIs that require an integer (e.g.
getLatestCommittedValue() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
Returns the value from the most recently committed transaction, or empty if no committed transaction has been recorded yet.
getLogEntry(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.api.ElectionController
Returns this node's log entry for the given transaction.
getMetrics() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.api.MetricsController
Returns the current aggregate transaction outcome metrics.
getStatus() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.api.CoordinatorStatusController
Returns the current health status and active faults of the coordinator.
getStatus() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application.CoordinatorStatusService
Returns an immutable snapshot of the coordinator's current health.
getStatus() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
 
getStatus() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.StatusController
Returns a simple status document for this node.
getValue() - Method in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.NodeRole
Returns the string identifier for this node role.
getValue() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
 
getVotes() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
Returns an immutable snapshot of votes collected during Phase 1.
GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.common.api
Registers the shared HTTP exception handler as a controller advice in the coordinator context.
GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.common.api
Registers the shared HTTP exception handler as a controller advice in the participant context.
GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.common.api.GlobalExceptionHandler
 
GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.common.api.GlobalExceptionHandler
 

H

handleAbort(AbortMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.application.ProtocolService
Handles an ABORT message by updating the log to ABORTED.
handleCommit(CommitMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.application.ProtocolService
Handles a COMMIT message by updating the log to COMMITTED.
handleConstraintViolation(ConstraintViolationException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles JSR-303 / Jakarta Bean Validation constraint violations raised at the method level (e.g. on @PathVariable or service methods).
handleMediaTypeNotAcceptable(HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles requests whose Accept header cannot be satisfied.
handleMediaTypeNotSupported(HttpMediaTypeNotSupportedException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles requests whose Content-Type is not supported by the endpoint.
handleMethodNotSupported(HttpRequestMethodNotSupportedException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles requests that use an HTTP method not supported by the endpoint.
handleMissingParam(MissingServletRequestParameterException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles missing required request parameters.
handlePrepare(PrepareMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.application.ProtocolService
Handles a PREPARE message by deciding the vote and persisting it.
handleTypeMismatch(MethodArgumentTypeMismatchException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles path-variable or query-parameter type conversion failures.
handleUnreadableMessage(HttpMessageNotReadableException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles missing or malformed JSON request bodies.
handleValidation(MethodArgumentNotValidException) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
Handles @Valid / @Validated bean validation failures on request bodies, listing every failing field and its constraint message.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.AbortMessage
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.CommitMessage

Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SimulationConfigRequest
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SystemEventDto
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionRequest

hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionResponse
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.VoteMessage
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorNodeStatus
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Returns a hash code value for this object.
hashCode() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.domain.LogEntry
Returns a hash code value for this object.
host() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.ParticipantRegistrationDto
Returns the value of the host record component.
host() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Returns the value of the host record component.
HttpExceptionHandlerSupport - Class in com.distributed2pc.common.api
Shared HTTP exception-handling logic for all service modules.
HttpExceptionHandlerSupport() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.common.api.HttpExceptionHandlerSupport
 

I

initiate(TransactionRequest) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.api.TransactionController
Initiates a new 2PC transaction.
initiate(String) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.application.TwoPhaseCommitService
Initiates a new 2PC transaction for the given value.
INITIATED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.TransactionStatus
Transaction object created; preparation not yet started.
initiatedAt() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionResponse
Returns the value of the initiatedAt record component.
inject(FaultRequest) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.api.FaultController
Injects or clears a fault.
InMemoryParticipantRepository - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure
Thread-safe in-memory implementation of ParticipantRepository.
InMemoryParticipantRepository() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure.InMemoryParticipantRepository
 
InMemoryTransactionLog - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure
Thread-safe in-memory transaction log for a participant.
InMemoryTransactionLog() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
 
InMemoryTransactionRepository - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure
Thread-safe in-memory implementation of TransactionRepository.
InMemoryTransactionRepository() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionRepository
 
inProgress() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Returns the value of the inProgress record component.
INTERMITTENT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultType
Fault alternates between active and inactive at a configurable period (onMs / offMs), modelling intermittent connectivity issues.
INTERMITTENT_CHANCE_PERCENT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
Default per-request failure probability for the INTERMITTENT strategy (50 %).
IntermittentFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
Fault strategy that simulates intermittent failures: once activated the node randomly rejects requests with a configurable probability.
IntermittentFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.IntermittentFaultStrategy
 
isActive() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashCoordinatorFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.PartialSendFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.domain.ParticipantFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.IntermittentFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.NetworkDelayFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.TransientFaultStrategy
Returns whether this fault is currently active.
isActive(FaultType) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application.CoordinatorFaultService
Returns whether the specified fault is currently active on the coordinator.
isActive(FaultType) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.application.FaultInjectionService
Returns whether the specified fault is currently active.
isCoordinatorReachable() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.CoordinatorHeartbeatMonitor
Returns whether the coordinator was reachable on the last heartbeat check.
isRedundancyEnabled() - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.common.simulation.SimulationModePort
Returns whether the recovery redundancy protocol is currently enabled.
isRedundancyEnabled() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.simulation.application.SimulationModeService
Returns whether the recovery redundancy protocol is currently enabled.
isRedundancyEnabled() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.simulation.application.SimulationModeService
Returns whether the election-recovery protocol is currently active on this participant.

L

listActive() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.api.FaultController
Returns all currently active faults on this participant.
listActiveFaults() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.application.CoordinatorFaultService
Returns all fault types that are currently active on the coordinator.
listActiveFaults() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.application.FaultInjectionService
Returns all active faults for status reporting.
listAll() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.api.ParticipantController
Returns all participants currently known to the coordinator.
listAll() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.application.ParticipantRegistrationService
Returns all currently registered participants.
listAll() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.api.TransactionController
Returns all transactions recorded by the coordinator.
LogEntry - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.domain
Immutable log entry written by a participant before responding to any 2PC message.
LogEntry(UUID, TransactionStatus, String, Instant) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.domain.LogEntry
Creates an instance of a LogEntry record class.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.CoordinatorApplication
 
main(String[]) - Static method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.ParticipantApplication
 
markCrashed(String) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.application.ParticipantRegistrationService
Marks a participant as crashed (HTTP 503 received from it).
markOnline(String) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.application.ParticipantRegistrationService
Marks a participant as online (successfully responded after being considered crashed).
MESSAGE - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.api.ResponseBodyKey
JSON key for the human-readable detail message.
MESSAGE_LOSS - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultType
Drops outbound messages (HTTP responses) with a configurable probability (0.0–1.0), simulating an unreliable network.
MetricsController - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.api
REST endpoint that exposes aggregate transaction metrics to the UI.
MetricsController() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.api.MetricsController
 
MetricsResponse - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Response DTO used by the coordinator's metrics endpoint to expose transaction outcome statistics and the current simulation configuration to the UI.
MetricsResponse(long, long, long, long, long, long, boolean) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Creates an instance of a MetricsResponse record class.
MetricsService - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.application
Computes aggregate statistics across all transactions to give the UI a live fault-coverage and outcome summary.
MetricsService() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.metrics.application.MetricsService
 

N

NETWORK_DELAY - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultType
Adds artificial latency (configurable milliseconds) to all outbound responses, simulating a slow or congested network link.
NETWORK_DELAY_MS - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
Default artificial delay applied by the NETWORK_DELAY strategy (1 000 ms).
NetworkDelayFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
NETWORK_DELAY fault strategy: adds configurable latency to every outbound response.
NetworkDelayFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.NetworkDelayFaultStrategy
 
NO - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.VoteResult
Participant cannot commit (resource unavailable, fault injected, etc.).
nodeEvent(EventType, String, Map<String, Object>) - Static method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SystemEventDto
Convenience factory for events that do not involve a specific transaction.
NodeRole - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.enums
Logical roles that identify nodes participating in the 2PC protocol.
NodeStatus - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.enums
Online/offline status of a node as reported to the coordinator or UI.

O

objectMapper() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.AppConfig
Jackson ObjectMapper with JSR-310 (Java 8 date/time) support.
objectMapper() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.config.ParticipantConfig
Jackson ObjectMapper with Java 8 date/time support.
ONLINE - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.NodeStatus
Node is reachable and operating normally.
OpenApiConfig - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config
SpringDoc OpenAPI configuration for the 2PC Coordinator service.
OpenApiConfig - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.config
SpringDoc OpenAPI configuration for the 2PC Participant service.
OpenApiConfig() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.OpenApiConfig
 
OpenApiConfig() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.config.OpenApiConfig
 

P

parameters() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.FaultRequest
Returns the value of the parameters record component.
PARTIAL_SEND_COUNT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
Default number of participants that receive the Phase-2 decision in the PARTIAL_SEND strategy (1).
partialSendFaultStrategy() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.CoordinatorConfig
Singleton bean for the partial-send fault strategy.
PartialSendFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure
CoordinatorFaultStrategy that simulates partial Phase 2 delivery: the coordinator sends commit/abort to only the first count participants (default 1), leaving the rest uncertain.
PartialSendFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.PartialSendFaultStrategy
 
PARTICIPANT_CRASHED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
PARTICIPANT_RECOVERED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
PARTICIPANT_REGISTERED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
PARTICIPANT_REQUEST - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.ProtocolTimeout
Maximum wait time for a participant to respond to a PREPARE, COMMIT or ABORT message (5 seconds).
ParticipantApplication - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant
Entry point for a 2PC Participant service instance.
ParticipantApplication() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.ParticipantApplication
 
ParticipantConfig - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.config
Spring configuration for the participant service.
ParticipantConfig() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.config.ParticipantConfig
 
ParticipantController - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.api
REST controller for participant registration and listing.
ParticipantController() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.api.ParticipantController
 
ParticipantFaultStrategy - Interface in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.domain
Strategy contract for applying or clearing a specific fault type on a participant node.
ParticipantHttpClient - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure
HTTP client for sending 2PC protocol messages to a single participant.
ParticipantHttpClient(WebClient.Builder) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.ParticipantHttpClient
 
participantOpenApi() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.config.OpenApiConfig
Configures the OpenAPI metadata displayed in Swagger UI.
ParticipantRegistrationDto - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Registration payload sent by a participant to the coordinator at startup.
ParticipantRegistrationDto(String, String, int) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.ParticipantRegistrationDto
Creates an instance of a ParticipantRegistrationDto record class.
ParticipantRegistrationService - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.application
Handles participant registration and status management in the coordinator.
ParticipantRegistrationService() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.application.ParticipantRegistrationService
 
ParticipantRepository - Interface in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain
Port (interface) for reading and updating registered participant data.
payload() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SystemEventDto
Returns the value of the payload record component.
PEER_CONSULTED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
PeerConsultationClient - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure
HTTP client used to query a peer participant's persisted log entry for a given transaction during coordinator-failure election.
PeerConsultationClient(WebClient.Builder) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.PeerConsultationClient
 
PeerLogEntryDto - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Participant's local log entry for a transaction.
PeerLogEntryDto(UUID, TransactionStatus, String, Instant) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.PeerLogEntryDto
Creates an instance of a PeerLogEntryDto record class.
phase() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.PeerLogEntryDto
Returns the value of the phase record component.
phase() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.domain.LogEntry
Returns the value of the phase record component.
port() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.ParticipantRegistrationDto
Returns the value of the port record component.
port() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Returns the value of the port record component.
preHandle(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, Object) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashCoordinatorInterceptor
Rejects the request with 503 when the crash simulation is active.
preHandle(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, Object) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.CrashInterceptor
Blocks the request with 503 if this participant is currently simulating a crash.
prepare(PrepareMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.ProtocolController
Phase 1: receives a PREPARE and returns this participant's vote.
PREPARE_SENT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
PrepareMessage - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Message sent by the coordinator to each participant during Phase 1 of the 2PC protocol.
PrepareMessage(UUID, String) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.PrepareMessage
Creates an instance of a PrepareMessage record class.
PREPARING - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.TransactionStatus
PREPARE sent to all participants; waiting for votes.
ProtocolController - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api
REST controllers that receive 2PC protocol messages from the coordinator.
ProtocolController() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.ProtocolController
 
ProtocolService - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.application
Handles the 2PC protocol messages for this participant.
ProtocolService(String, InMemoryTransactionLog, ForceAbortVoteFaultStrategy) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.application.ProtocolService
 
ProtocolTimeout - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain
Timeout values used when the coordinator communicates with participants over HTTP during the Two-Phase Commit protocol.
publish(SystemEventDto) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.event.application.EventPublisher
Broadcasts a system event to all UI subscribers.

R

random() - Static method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionRequest
Factory method for convenient test construction.
read(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
Retrieves the last known log entry for a transaction.
recordVote(String, VoteResult) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
Records a vote from one participant.
recoverAllPreparingNow() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler
Immediately triggers peer-election for all PREPARING transactions regardless of their age.
recoverUncertainTransactions() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler
Scans for timed-out PREPARING transactions and triggers peer-election for each.
redundancyEnabled() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Returns the value of the redundancyEnabled record component.
redundancyEnabled() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SimulationConfigRequest
Returns the value of the redundancyEnabled record component.
register(ParticipantRegistrationDto) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.api.ParticipantController
Accepts a participant self-registration request.
register(ParticipantRegistrationDto) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.application.ParticipantRegistrationService
Registers or updates a participant's connection information.
RegisteredParticipant - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain
Runtime representation of a participant node registered with the coordinator.
RegisteredParticipant(String, String, int, NodeStatus) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Creates an instance of a RegisteredParticipant record class.
registerStompEndpoints(StompEndpointRegistry) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.WebSocketConfig
 
ResponseBodyKey - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.api
Keys and standard label values used in JSON error-response bodies returned by HTTP exception handlers.
run(ApplicationArguments) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.infrastructure.StartupRegistrationRunner
Executes on startup – posts the registration DTO to the coordinator.
runElection(UUID) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.api.ElectionController
Triggers the election/termination protocol for a transaction.

S

save(RegisteredParticipant) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.ParticipantRepository
Persist a newly registered participant.
save(RegisteredParticipant) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure.InMemoryParticipantRepository
 
save(CoordinatorTransaction) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.TransactionRepository
Persists a new transaction.
save(CoordinatorTransaction) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionRepository
 
sendAbort(RegisteredParticipant, AbortMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.ParticipantHttpClient
Sends an ABORT message to the given participant.
sendCommit(RegisteredParticipant, CommitMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.ParticipantHttpClient
Sends a COMMIT message to the given participant.
sendPrepare(RegisteredParticipant, PrepareMessage) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.ParticipantHttpClient
Sends a PREPARE message to the given participant and returns its vote.
serverId() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.ParticipantRegistrationDto
Returns the value of the serverId record component.
serverId() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.PeerLogEntryDto
Returns the value of the serverId record component.
serverId() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.VoteMessage
Returns the value of the serverId record component.
serverId() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorNodeStatus
Returns the value of the serverId record component.
serverId() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Returns the value of the serverId record component.
setRedundancyEnabled(boolean) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.common.simulation.SimulationModePort
Enables or disables the recovery redundancy protocol.
setRedundancyEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.simulation.application.SimulationModeService
Enables or disables the election-recovery redundancy protocol.
setRedundancyEnabled(boolean) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.simulation.application.SimulationModeService
Enables or disables the election-recovery redundancy protocol on this participant.
setStatus(TransactionStatus) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.CoordinatorTransaction
Directly sets the transaction status without recording a decision timestamp.
SimulationConfigController - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.simulation.api
REST endpoint for reading and updating the simulation mode on the coordinator.
SimulationConfigController - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.simulation.api
REST endpoint for reading and updating the simulation mode on this participant node.
SimulationConfigController(SimulationModeService) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.simulation.api.SimulationConfigController
Creates the controller with the coordinator's simulation mode service.
SimulationConfigController(SimulationModeService) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.simulation.api.SimulationConfigController
Creates the controller with the participant's simulation mode service.
SimulationConfigRequest - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Request payload for enabling or disabling the redundancy / recovery protocol on any node (coordinator or participant).
SimulationConfigRequest(boolean) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SimulationConfigRequest
Creates an instance of a SimulationConfigRequest record class.
SimulationModePort - Interface in com.distributed2pc.common.simulation
Port for reading and updating the simulation redundancy flag on any node.
SimulationModeService - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.simulation.application
Holds the coordinator-side flag that enables or disables the participant election-recovery protocol.
SimulationModeService - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.simulation.application
Holds the participant-side flag that enables or disables the election-recovery termination protocol.
SimulationModeService() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.simulation.application.SimulationModeService
 
SimulationModeService() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.simulation.application.SimulationModeService
 
size() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
Returns the total number of entries in the log.
sourceNodeId() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SystemEventDto
Returns the value of the sourceNodeId record component.
StartupRegistrationRunner - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.infrastructure
Registers this participant with the coordinator on application startup.
StartupRegistrationRunner(WebClient.Builder, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.infrastructure.StartupRegistrationRunner
 
status() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionResponse
Returns the value of the status record component.
status() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.fault.domain.CoordinatorNodeStatus
Returns the value of the status record component.
status() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Returns the value of the status record component.
StatusController - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api
REST endpoint that exposes the current health and active-fault summary of this participant node.
StatusController(FaultInjectionService, String, InMemoryTransactionLog) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.protocol.api.StatusController
Creates a new StatusController bound to this participant's identity.
SystemEventDto - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Generic event broadcast over WebSocket to the UI via /topic/events.

REST controller that exposes transaction management to the UI and external clients.

TransactionRepository - Interface in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain
Port for reading and writing coordinator-side transaction state.
TransactionRequest - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Request body for initiating a new 2PC transaction via the coordinator REST API.
TransactionRequest(String) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionRequest
Creates an instance of a TransactionRequest record class.
TransactionResponse - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Response returned by the coordinator after a transaction has been initiated or completed.
TransactionResponse(UUID, TransactionStatus, String, Instant, Instant, Map<String, VoteResult>) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionResponse
Creates an instance of a TransactionResponse record class.
TransactionResponseMapper - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.api
Maps CoordinatorTransaction domain objects to TransactionResponse DTOs.
TransactionResponseMapper() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.api.TransactionResponseMapper
 
TransactionStatus - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.enums
Lifecycle states of a 2PC transaction, as seen by the coordinator.
TRANSIENT - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultType
Fault is active for a fixed duration (configurable milliseconds) and then automatically clears.
TRANSIENT_DURATION_MS - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.FaultDefault
Default active window for the TRANSIENT strategy (2 000 ms).
TransientFaultStrategy - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure
Fault strategy that simulates a transient failure: the node appears crashed for a configurable duration and then automatically recovers.
TransientFaultStrategy() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.fault.infrastructure.TransientFaultStrategy
 
TwoPhaseCommitService - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.application
Orchestrates the Two-Phase Commit protocol from the coordinator's perspective.
TwoPhaseCommitService(TransactionRepository, ParticipantRepository, ParticipantRegistrationService, ParticipantHttpClient, EventPublisher, PartialSendFaultStrategy, DelayedDecisionFaultStrategy) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.application.TwoPhaseCommitService
 
txEvent(EventType, UUID, String, String, Map<String, Object>) - Static method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.SystemEventDto
Convenience factory for transaction-scoped events.
type() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.FaultRequest
Returns the value of the type record component.

U

uncertain() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.MetricsResponse
Returns the value of the uncertain record component.
UNCERTAIN - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.TransactionStatus
Coordinator crashed after Phase 1; outcome determined by participant election.
UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure
Scheduled component that automatically recovers participants stuck in the TransactionStatus.PREPARING phase after the coordinator has failed.
UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler(InMemoryTransactionLog, ElectionService, long) - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.election.infrastructure.UncertainTransactionRecoveryScheduler
 
updateConfig(SimulationConfigRequest) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.common.simulation.BaseSimulationConfigController
Updates the simulation configuration on this node.
updatePhase(UUID, TransactionStatus) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
Updates the phase of an existing log entry.
updateStatus(String, NodeStatus) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.ParticipantRepository
Update the online/offline status of a participant.
updateStatus(String, NodeStatus) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.infrastructure.InMemoryParticipantRepository
 
updateStatus(UUID, TransactionStatus) - Method in interface com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.domain.TransactionRepository
Updates the status of an existing transaction.
updateStatus(UUID, TransactionStatus) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.transaction.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionRepository

Returns the value of the vote record component.
VOTE_RECEIVED - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.EventType
 
VoteMessage - Record Class in com.distributed2pc.common.dto
Participant response to a PREPARE message (Phase 1 of 2PC).
VoteMessage(UUID, VoteResult, String) - Constructor for record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.VoteMessage
Creates an instance of a VoteMessage record class.
VoteResult - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.common.enums
Possible outcomes of a participant vote in Phase 1 of the 2PC protocol.
votes() - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.common.dto.TransactionResponse
Returns the value of the votes record component.

W

webClientBuilder() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.AppConfig
Provides a WebClient.Builder configured with a custom SSL context that trusts the shared participant certificate while disabling hostname verification for intra-Docker communication.
webClientBuilder() - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.config.ParticipantConfig
Shared WebClient builder configured with the shared trust store so that peer-to-peer and coordinator HTTPS calls succeed inside Docker.
WebMvcConfig - Class in com.distributed2pc.participant.config
Registers Spring MVC interceptors for the participant service.
WebMvcConfig() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.participant.config.WebMvcConfig
 
WebSocketConfig - Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config
Configures STOMP over WebSocket.
WebSocketConfig() - Constructor for class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.config.WebSocketConfig
 
WebSocketTopic - Enum Class in com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.event.domain
STOMP WebSocket topic paths to which the coordinator publishes events.
withPhase(TransactionStatus) - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.domain.LogEntry
Returns a copy of this entry with the phase updated to reflect a decision.
withStatus(NodeStatus) - Method in record class com.distributed2pc.coordinator.feature.participant.domain.RegisteredParticipant
Returns a copy of this participant with an updated status.
write(LogEntry) - Method in class com.distributed2pc.participant.feature.log.infrastructure.InMemoryTransactionLog
Writes or overwrites the log entry for the given transaction.

Y

YES - Enum constant in enum class com.distributed2pc.common.enums.VoteResult
Participant is ready and willing to commit the transaction.
